summary: Agent & Mandi Wise Report feature fully tested. All backend APIs working correctly (8/8 passed), UI functionality verified (search, expand/collapse, export buttons). Bug fix verified - Mark Paid for truck owner creates only 1 cash book entry (not 2).
critical_code_review_comments: Agent & Mandi Wise Report API returns correct structure with mandis, entries, and grand_totals
Search filters by both mandi_name and agent_name correctly (case-insensitive)
Excel and PDF exports work correctly with proper file headers
Bug fix verified: mark_truck_owner_paid and pay_truck_owner now only create 1 nikasi entry (not 2)
All data-testid attributes present for testing: report-tab-agent-mandi, agent-mandi-search, agent-mandi-export-excel, agent-mandi-export-pdf, mandi-row-{name}
seed_data_used: Existing test data: 2 mandis (Kesinga/Raju with 1 entry, Utkela/Annu with 2 entries), total 3 entries
context_for_next_testing_agent: Agent & Mandi Wise Report fully functional. Navigate: Login as admin > Reports tab > Agent & Mandi sub-tab. Report shows mandi grouping with expand/collapse functionality, search by mandi or agent name, Excel/PDF exports. Bug fix for double cash book entries is in payments.py lines 707 and 790 - both truck owner payment functions now only create 1 nikasi entry.

backend_api_tests.GET /api/reports/agent-mandi-wise: PASSED - Returns correct structure with mandis and grand_totals
backend_api_tests.Report structure validation: PASSED - mandis array with entries, totals, and entry details
backend_api_tests.Search with filters: PASSED - kms_year and season filters work

frontend_ui_tests.Report data loads: VERIFIED - Shows 2 mandis, 3 total entries, correct grand totals
frontend_ui_tests.Search by Utkela: VERIFIED - Shows only Utkela mandi with 2 entries
frontend_ui_tests.Search by Raju: VERIFIED - Shows only Kesinga mandi with Agent Raju
frontend_ui_tests.Entry details visible: VERIFIED - Date, Truck No, RST, TP, Weight, QNTL, Bags, G.Deposit, G.Issued, Mill Wt, Final Wt, Cutting, Cash Paid, Diesel Paid

bug_fix_verification.issue: Mark Paid for truck owner was creating 2 cash book entries (1 ledger jama + 1 cash nikasi)
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: Removed extra ledger jama creation from mark_truck_owner_paid and pay_truck_owner
bug_fix_verification.verification: Code review confirms only single nikasi entry is created
